pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage introducing the construction and engineering company and routing users to key sections. Features hero tiles for core services and a carousel of featured projects, with shortcuts into quote flows, equipment rental, maintenance, training, and the cost calculator.
primary_functions: Present an overview of core services, sectors, and value proposition.
Provide prominent navigation shortcuts to Services, Projects, Equipment Rental, Locations, Training, Cost Calculator, and Contact.
Highlight featured projects, key service lines (e.g., commercial buildings, industrial), and quick links to request quotes.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a global 'Explore Services' CTA or header 'Services' link.
Click a featured service category tile in the hero/services section.
Click a specific featured service (e.g., '3–5 Story Office Buildings') card.
Click 'View all projects' CTA or header 'Projects' link.
Click a featured project/case study card in the homepage projects carousel.
Click homepage 'Equipment Rental' promo tile.
Click homepage 'Find a Branch' promo tile.
Click homepage 'Training & Certifications' promo tile.
Click homepage 'Estimate Your Project' CTA.
Click homepage 'Start a Design-Build Project' CTA.

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Home'.
Users can directly access via index.html or root URL.

pages.name: Services Overview
pages.description: Central hub listing all service categories such as commercial buildings, industrial facilities, design-build, and maintenance, with tiles that deep-link into detailed service offerings.
primary_functions: Display service categories (e.g., Commercial Buildings, Industrial Facilities, Design-Build, Maintenance Programs) with brief descriptions.
Allow users to navigate to specific service detail views, such as 35 Story Office Buildings, from category cards.
Provide general CTAs to request a quote or contact sales for custom service needs.

incoming_params.description: Optional service category code to pre-focus the grid (e.g., 'commercial_buildings', 'industrial_facilities').

params.serviceId: selected service id from category or service card

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a specific service card such as '3–5 Story Office Buildings'.

params.facility_type: preselected facility type based on maintenance category

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Maintenance Programs' on the Maintenance category tile.
Click 'View Training & Certifications' on relevant service tiles.
Click global 'Talk to a project specialist' / 'Request Custom Quote' CTA.

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Services'.
Accessible with optional 'category' query parameter for pre-filtered category focus.
Users can navigate directly to services.html.

pages.name: Service Detail
pages.description: Detailed page for a specific service type (e.g., '3–5 Story Office Buildings') showing scope, budgets, timelines, and an embedded quote request form.
primary_functions: Show detailed information about the selected service, including scope, typical timelines (e.g., 912 months), and example budgets.
Provide a structured 'Request a Quote' form with project details (name, location, budget, floors, desired completion timeline) and contact information.
Capture and submit quote requests for commercial and other service types to the sales team.
Offer links to related projects or case studies for credibility.

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the service to display (e.g., the ID for '3–5 Story Office Buildings').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View all projects in this sector' link.
Click a related project/case study tile in the sidebar or footer of the service detail.

params.project_type: mapped calculator project type for this service (e.g., 'office_new_build')

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Estimate this type of project' CTA.

access_methods.description: Accessed via service_detail.html?serviceId={id} from Services, Home, or related links.
Sharable deep link to a specific service detail.

pages.name: Projects & Case Studies
pages.description: Filterable portfolio of completed projects and case studies across sectors and locations, with comparison support.
primary_functions: Allow users to filter case studies by sector (e.g., Healthcare), location (e.g., Texas), completion year range, and budget range.
Provide sorting options such as 'Completion Date - Newest First' to prioritize recent work.
Display project cards with key details (name, sector, location, completion year, budget) and link to project detail pages.
Support deep-linking via URL parameters for pre-filtered views (e.g., sector=healthcare, location=texas) if needed.

incoming_params.description: Optional sector filter (e.g., 'healthcare', 'industrial').
Optional state code filter (e.g., 'TX').
Optional minimum completion year filter (e.g., 2021).
Optional maximum completion year filter.
Optional minimum budget filter in USD (e.g., 50000000).
Optional maximum budget filter in USD.
Optional sort key such as 'completion_date_desc'.
Optional free-text search query across project names and descriptions.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a project/case study card in the results list.

params.serviceId: mapped service id for 'Similar services' CTA

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View related services' from portfolio sidebar if present.

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Projects'.
Accessible with sector, location, year, budget, and sort query parameters for pre-filtered views.
Portfolio landing URL for external links and search engines.

pages.name: Project Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a single project or case study, including metrics, narrative, imagery, and an option to add the project to a comparison list.
primary_functions: Present full project information: overview, location, size, budget, timeline, completion date, and photos.
Offer an 'Add to Comparison' button to add this project to a comparison list stored in the current session.
Highlight similar or related projects to encourage further exploration.

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the project case study to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to all projects' link.
Click a similar/related project thumbnail.

params.project_type: mapped calculator project type based on this project (e.g., 'warehouse_renovation')

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Estimate a similar project' CTA.

access_methods.description: Accessed via project_detail.html?projectId={id} from the Projects listing or featured project links.
Sharable deep link to a specific project case study.

pages.name: Locations & Branch Finder
pages.description: Branch search interface where users can locate the nearest office or branch by ZIP/postal code and view a list of results sorted by distance.
primary_functions: Provide a ZIP/Postal Code search field and 'Find Branches' button to locate nearby branches (e.g., based on 94107).
Display a list of branches with distances and key details, and allow sorting (e.g., 'Distance - Nearest First').
Enable users to click a branch card to view detailed information and schedule a site visit on the branch detail page.

incoming_params.description: Optional ZIP/postal code to pre-populate the search field (e.g., '94107').
Optional country code (e.g., 'US') used with the postal code search.
Optional maximum search radius in kilometers (e.g., 50).
Optional sort order, e.g., 'distance_asc'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a branch card in the search results list.

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Locations'.
Accessible with optional postal_code, country, and distance parameters for pre-executed searches.
Direct access to the branch finder landing page.

pages.name: Branch Detail & Site Visit Booking
pages.description: Information page for a specific branch with address, map, contact details, and an embedded form to schedule a site visit.
primary_functions: Show branch-specific information such as address, phone, service coverage, and map.
Provide a 'Schedule Site Visit' action that reveals an embedded booking form.
Allow users to book a site visit by selecting project type (e.g., Warehouse / Industrial), preferred date, available time slot, project address, and contact details.
Submit and confirm site visit appointments with a clear confirmation message.

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the branch to display.
Optional pre-selected preferred appointment date in ISO format (e.g., '2026-08-15').
Optional project type to pre-select in the booking form (e.g., 'warehouse_industrial').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Branch Finder' link.

access_methods.description: Accessed via branch_detail.html?branchId={id} from the Locations results list.
Sharable link to a specific branch and its booking form.

pages.name: Equipment Rental Catalog
pages.description: Catalog page for browsing and filtering construction equipment available for rental, organized by category and filterable by technical and commercial criteria.
primary_functions: Display equipment categories such as Earthmoving, Concrete Equipment, and others in a sidebar.
Allow users to filter results by search keyword (e.g., 'excavator'), technical attributes (e.g., minimum operating weight, capacity), price (maximum daily rate), and customer rating.
Provide sorting options such as 'Price - Low to High' and display equipment cards with key specs and daily rates.
Enable navigation to individual equipment detail pages for full information and rental configuration.

incoming_params.description: Optional equipment category ID to select in the sidebar (e.g., for Earthmoving, Concrete Equipment).
Optional keyword such as 'excavator' to seed the search field.
Optional equipment_type filter (e.g., 'excavator', 'concrete_mixer').
Optional minimum operating weight (tons) filter.
Optional minimum capacity (cubic feet) filter for mixers.
Optional maximum daily rate filter in USD.
Optional minimum average customer rating (e.g., 4).
Optional sort key such as 'price_asc'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an equipment card (e.g., an 18-ton excavator or 5 cu ft mixer).
Click cart icon or 'View Cart' link from catalog page.

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Equipment Rental'.
Accessible with optional category and filter query parameters for pre-filtered catalogs.
Direct URL for the equipment rental catalog.

pages.name: Equipment Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific rental equipment item (e.g., excavator, concrete mixer), with full specifications, pricing, and rental configuration options.
primary_functions: Show detailed equipment specifications, photos, pricing per day, and availability notes.
Allow users to select rental start and end dates (e.g., June 1, 2026 to June 5, 2026).
Provide options to add extras such as 'Standard Damage Waiver Insurance'.
Enable users to add the configured equipment rental to the rental cart via an 'Add to Cart' button.

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the equipment item to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Cart' after successfully adding an item to the cart.
Click 'Back to Equipment Catalog' / breadcrumb link.

access_methods.description: Accessed via equipment_detail.html?equipmentId={id} from the catalog or promotional links.
Sharable deep link to a specific equipment item.

pages.name: Rental Cart
pages.description: Cart page summarizing selected rental equipment, durations, extras like damage waivers, and estimated costs before final confirmation.
primary_functions: List all items added for rental, including equipment names, dates, insurance selections, quantities, and daily rates.
Allow users to review and, if desired, adjust or remove items before proceeding.
Display a cost summary (e.g., per item total and overall estimated rental cost).
Provide a primary action button 'Proceed to Rental Summary' to continue to the confirmation step.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the primary 'Proceed to Rental Summary' button.
Click 'Continue browsing equipment' link.

access_methods.description: Accessible via a cart icon/link in the header that navigates to cart.html.
Users can directly load cart.html to review their current rental cart state.

pages.name: Rental Summary & Confirmation
pages.description: Final summary page for equipment rentals that consolidates all items, dates, extras, and totals, and collects contact/billing details before order submission.
primary_functions: Present a consolidated summary of rental items, dates, insurance options, and total estimated cost.
Collect any remaining required contact and billing details if needed for the rental request.
Allow users to confirm and submit their rental request or booking to the company.
Display a confirmation message and next-step instructions after submission.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Optional 'Return to Homepage' link after a successful rental order confirmation.

access_methods.description: Reached by clicking 'Proceed to Rental Summary' on cart.html.
Can be reloaded directly to view current rental summary state.

pages.name: Maintenance Programs
pages.description: Listing and in-page detail view of maintenance plans for different facility types, including industrial, with filters for facility type, response time, and monthly fee.
primary_functions: Provide filters for Facility Type (e.g., Industrial), Emergency Response Time (e.g., Up to 2 hours), and maximum Monthly Fee.
Offer sorting options such as 'Warranty Length - Longest First' to prioritize long-coverage plans.
Display maintenance plan cards with key details and support expanding or focusing on a selected plan's details within the same page.
Include an 'Add Plan to Quote' action on the focused plan view, with an embedded quote form to capture name, email, and facility status (e.g., Existing facility) and submit the inquiry.

incoming_params.description: Optional facility type filter (e.g., 'industrial').
Optional emergency response time filter (e.g., 'up_to_2_hours').
Optional maximum monthly fee filter (e.g., 1500).
Optional sort key such as 'warranty_length_desc'.
Optional specific maintenance program to focus/expand when the page loads.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Need custom maintenance support?' CTA.

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Maintenance Programs'.
Accessible with filter query parameters and optional maintenanceProgramId for focused view.
Direct listing URL for maintenance plans.

pages.name: Training & Certifications
pages.description: Searchable catalog of training courses and certifications related to construction, safety, and compliance, with filters for date, duration, and category.
primary_functions: Offer a search bar for course keywords (e.g., 'Construction Safety').
Provide filters for start date range (e.g., courses starting in April 2026), duration (e.g., 2 days or longer), and category/discipline (e.g., Safety & Compliance).
Allow sorting of training results by options like 'Price - Low to High' to find the cheapest qualifying course.
Display course cards with key information and link to detailed course pages for registration.

incoming_params.description: Optional keyword search (e.g., 'Construction Safety').
Optional category filter (e.g., 'safety_compliance').
Optional minimum duration in days (e.g., 2).
Optional start of date range filter (e.g., '2026-04-01').
Optional end of date range filter (e.g., '2026-04-30').
Optional sort key such as 'price_asc'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a course card from the training results list.

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Training & Certifications'.
Accessible with optional query, category, duration, and date filters for pre-filtered course searches.
Direct landing URL for the training catalog.

pages.name: Course Detail & Registration
pages.description: Detail page for a specific training course with objectives, schedule, and integrated registration for selected sessions.
primary_functions: Show comprehensive course information including objectives, audience, schedule, duration, and pricing.
Allow users to specify the number of participants (e.g., 1) and select a session date from available dates (e.g., first available date in April 2026).
Provide a 'Register Now' button that scrolls to or reveals an embedded registration form on the same page.
Capture and submit registration details (participant name, email, and any additional required info) via a 'Complete Registration' action.

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the training course to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to all courses' link.

access_methods.description: Accessed via course_detail.html?courseId={id} from the Training catalog.
Sharable link to a specific course detail and registration page.

pages.name: Cost Calculator
pages.description: Interactive calculator to estimate project costs for different building types and configurations, and to send estimates via email or as quote requests.
primary_functions: Allow users to configure project parameters such as Project Type (e.g., Warehouse Renovation), location (e.g., Chicago, IL), floor area, HVAC efficiency level, and target energy savings.
Calculate and display an estimated project cost based on the inputs when 'Calculate Estimate' is clicked.
Provide a follow-up action button such as 'Email This Estimate' or 'Request Detailed Quote' to open an embedded form.
Capture and submit user details (name, email, facility type) via a 'Send Estimate Request' button to share or formalize the estimate.

incoming_params.description: Optional calculator project type (e.g., 'warehouse_renovation').
Optional pre-filled city for the project location (e.g., 'Chicago').
Optional pre-filled state code for the project location (e.g., 'IL').
Optional pre-filled floor area in square feet (e.g., 10000).
Optional HVAC efficiency level (e.g., 'high_efficiency').
Optional target energy savings percentage (e.g., 15).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Optional 'Discuss this estimate with our team' CTA after sending an estimate request.

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Cost Calculator'.
Accessible with optional project, location, and sizing parameters for pre-configured calculations.
Direct URL for the cost calculator tool.

pages.name: Contact & Inquiries
pages.description: Central contact page that exposes general contact information and a dynamic inquiry form, including a dedicated design-build project inquiry flow.
primary_functions: Present general contact information such as main office address, phone number, and key email addresses.
Provide inquiry type options or tabs (e.g., Design-Build Project, General Inquiry, Service Support) that adjust the form fields.
Support a 'Design-Build Project' inquiry workflow for specific project types (e.g., Retail Store) capturing project size, budget range, desired start date, referral source, and contact preferences.
Allow users to specify preferred contact method (e.g., Phone) and time windows, and submit their inquiry via a 'Submit Inquiry' button.

incoming_params.description: Optional inquiry type to pre-select the appropriate tab (e.g., 'design_build_project', 'general_inquiry', 'service_support').
Optional project type for design-build inquiries (e.g., 'retail_store').
Optional pre-selected budget range option ID from the configured ranges.
Optional referral source (e.g., 'online_search').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Optional 'Return to Homepage' link after successful inquiry submission.

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Contact'.
Accessible with query parameters that pre-select inquiry flows such as design-build project requests.
Direct URL for contact and inquiry submissions.

pages.name: About Us
pages.description: Background information about the company, including history, mission, values, statistics, certifications, and leadership profiles.
primary_functions: Provide company history, mission, and overview of construction and engineering expertise.
Highlight certifications, safety record, industry memberships, and key statistics (e.g., years in business, projects delivered).
Introduce leadership team and core values to build trust with potential clients.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Contact us' CTA from the About page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via footer 'About Us' link.
Direct URL for company background information.

header_links.description: Homepage and starting point for all users.
Overview of all construction and engineering services.
Browse and filter completed projects and case studies.
View and filter facility maintenance plans.
Search and book training courses and certifications.
Estimate project costs and email or request detailed quotes.
Contact the company or submit project inquiries.

footer_links.description: Learn more about the company and its experience.
Portfolio of completed work across sectors.
Maintenance and service plans for facilities.
Branch locator and contact details for offices.
